caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and its applications. The main screen displays a visual map with interconnected nodes, highlighting concepts such as "buying," "selling," and "solving systems thinking." A smaller inset shows a person, presumably the presenter, who is speaking and gesturing, indicating an active discussion or explanation of the content. In the background, there is a scene of people shopping in what looks like a warehouse store, possibly illustrating real-world examples related to the topics being discussed. The overall setting suggests an educational or professional context, with the presenter using both visual aids and live commentary to convey their message.
